happy.speech: i finally made up with my friend after a long argument and i feel so relieved and grateful

sad.speech: i feel so lonely lately because i couldn't keep my promise to my family

fear.speech: i'm really terrified of the upcoming presentation because i haven't prepared enough

disgust.speech: i feel so ashamed that i threw away the food that my roommate carefully prepared for me

surprise.speech: i didn't expect to hear from my old friend after 5 years, it completely caught me off guard

anger.speech: i am still so frustrated that i let my anger ruin such an important opportunity
